content: Welcome everyone to the Shiloh Baptist Planning team on Teams. Please make sure your notification settings are turned on so you don't miss any committee updates. Grace and peace to all.
Thank you, Deacon Pittman. Grateful to have this space for coordination. Let us use it to serve the congregation well. Looking forward to a productive fall season together.
I've shared the minutes from last month's in-person meeting to the Files tab. Let me know if anything looks off before I print copies for Sunday.
Got it, Gloria. Looked them over — all good from my end.
Committee call is set for Tuesday Oct 7 at 6 PM Central. Teams link will be in the calendar invite. Agenda: painting day logistics, grounds budget review, and holiday schedule. Please come prepared.
Confirmed for Tuesday. I'll have the outreach budget numbers ready to share. Should I send them here ahead of the call or wait until we're on?
Go ahead and post them here by Monday evening, Theresa. Gives everyone a chance to review before the call. Thank you.
I'll send the meeting notes to everyone within 24 hours after the call. If anyone has corrections please reply here rather than email so we keep it all in one place.
Kicking off the Painting Day channel. We're targeting Saturday Nov 15. I've spoken with Brother Davis about borrowing the church van to haul supplies from Lowe's. We'll need at least 12 volunteers.
I can coordinate the food for the volunteers — thinking sandwiches and lemonade for lunch. Budget around $80. Should be fine within what we approved last month.
I'll put a sign-up form on the church website by this weekend. Should make it easy to track volunteer counts. I'll post the link here once it's live.
Sign-up form is live at shilohbaptistbiloxi.org/paintingday. Already have 6 names as of this morning. Please share with the congregation on Sunday.
I can help haul supplies with my truck if the van isn't enough. Just let me know what time to be there Saturday morning.
John, that would be a real blessing. Plan for 7:30 AM at Lowe's on Pass Road. We'll split the load between your truck and the van. Thank you, brother.
Grounds update: the riding mower needs a new belt before the fall cleanup day. Got a quote of $65 from Roy's Small Engine on Division St. Recommend we approve it from the maintenance fund.
Approved — go ahead and get it done, Lamar. Keep the receipt for Gloria. While we're at it, can someone check the gutters on the fellowship hall? Brother Thompson mentioned debris buildup last week.
I can check the gutters on Saturday when I'm already out there. I've got a ladder that'll reach. Will report back what I find.
John checked the gutters — mostly leaves and pine straw. We cleared them out. No damage to the fascia. Should be good through winter. Mower belt is also fixed and running well.

Committee reminder: next planning call is Wednesday Dec 3 at 6 PM Central via Teams. Main topic is the Christmas program and January budget presentation to the congregation. Attendance expected from all members.
Confirmed for Dec 3. I'll have a draft of the January budget ready to share by the Monday before the call. Also a reminder that committee photos for the bulletin board are due to me by Nov 30.
Will be on the Dec 3 call. Happy Thanksgiving to everyone on the committee — grateful to serve alongside each of you this year. God bless.
Updated the church website with the Dec 3 call details and the painting day recap photos. Link: shilohbaptistbiloxi.org/news. Happy Thanksgiving all.
